title.si: කැකිරි වගාව — කෘෂිකර්ම දෙපාර්තමේන්තුව / HORDI නිර්දේශය
title.ta: வெள்ளரி பயிர்ச்செய்கை — வேளாண் திணைக்களம் / HORDI பரிந்துரை

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for cucumber (Cucumis sativus) up to 1000 m elevation. Released varieties: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, LY 58. Various soil types with good drainage; pH 5.5–7.5. Spacing 1 × 1 m monoculture; seed rate 1 kg/ha. Three-stage fertilizer. Yield: OPV 15–20 t/ha; hybrid 25–30 t/ha.
summary.si: 1000 m දක්වා උන්නතාංශයේ කැකිරි (Cucumis sativus) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. පරතරය 1 × 1 m; බීජ මාත්‍රාව 1 kg/ha. තුන් අදියර පොහොර. අස්වැන්න: OPV ටොන් 15-20/හෙ; හයිබ්‍රිඩ් ටොන් 25-30/හෙ.
summary.ta: 1000 m உயரம் வரை வெள்ளரி (Cucumis sativus) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. இடைவெளி 1 × 1 m; விதை அளவு 1 kg/ha. மூன்று கட்ட உரம். மகசூல்: OPV 15-20 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்; ஹைப்ரிட் 25-30 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்.

field_provenance.notes: Source lists fertilizer timings 'after 4 weeks' and 'after 5 weeks' back-to-back, which appears to be a typo (most cucurbit schedules have wider spacing). We transcribed both rates verbatim with the suspicion flagged; a DOA agronomist should re-confirm the second application window before the plan promotes from draft.

body.en: Well-drained soil with good organic matter; pH 5.5–7.5. Works on multiple soil types.
Direct seed at 1 × 1 m spacing for monoculture. Seed rate 1 kg/ha.

name.en: Cucumber seed (HORDI Green / HORDI White / Kalpitiya White / Champion / Gannoruwa White / LY 58)

body.en: Source lists this as a separate dressing despite the 1-week gap from week-4. Verify with DOA agronomist before applying.
Pick fruits at marketable size; continue every 2–3 days. Yield: OPV 15–20 t/ha; hybrid 25–30 t/ha.

notes.en: Powdery mildew and downy mildew. Apply recommended fungicides at first lesions per DOA 2019 pesticide recommendation.
Cucumber mosaic virus / zucchini yellow mosaic virus — vectored by aphids and whiteflies. Control vectors early; remove and destroy infected plants.
